case_title: DESMONS, DIMITRI et al VS ALEXANDER, SARA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DESMONS, DIMITRI HANCOCK, VALERIE AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, SARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, SARA
DEFENDANT SARA ALEXANDER LETTER REQUESTING A CONTINUANCE FILED. DEFT. PAID $10 COURT FEE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-13-2000, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO DEC-22-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF RECEIVED, REQUESTING FOR POSTPONEMENT OF TRIAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-22-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-09-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-09-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-01-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING.
REM: CORRESPONDENCE DTD 2-18-01 FROM THE PLTFS TO COMM. KAPLAN REC'D AND FILED IN COURT.
REM: CORRESPONDENCE DTD 2-15-01 FROM DEFT, SARE ALEXANDER REC'D & FILED IN COURT.
REM: COPY OF THE REPLY LTR BY COMM. KAPLAN TO THE PARTIES FILED.
REM: CORRESPONDENCE BY DEFT REC'D IN COURT.
REM: CORRESPONDENCE BY PLTF DTD 3-7-01 VIA MESSENGER REC'D IN COURT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESMONS, DIMITRI HANCOCK, VALERIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, SARA $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,020.00, (1) THE MONEY JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLFT'S ARISES FROM DAMAGES DONE TO PLFTS' PROPERTY BY DEFT. (2) THE COURT HAS RECEIVED A LETTER FROM DEFT DATED 3/5/01 & A LETTER DATED 3/7/01. IN LIGHT OF THE LETTERS, THE COURT ORDERS THAT DEFT IS TO COMPLETE THE NEW WALL CONSISTENT W/ S.F. CODE REQUIREMENTS. PLFTS ARE TO PERMIT DEFT ACCESS TO PLFTS PROPERTY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE ANY REQUIRED WORK ON THE NEW WALL.
